title: 2 Rapes In 12 Hours & Rs 2.5 Lakh Heist: Chilling Crime Spree Of Ex-Help Who Killed IRS Officer’s Daughter In Delhi
description: In a shocking twist to the Delhi horror case, the accused, Rahul Meena, had allegedly raped a woman in Alwar hours before targeting his former employer IRS officer’s daughter in the capital, killing her, looting cash and fleeing after a meticulously timed attack caught on CCTV.
